title: Gamingecke Summer 2024
description: Our Vanilla+ modpack invites players to a unique gaming experience. This special modpack was developed for a project by Gamingecke.space and its partners to provide an unforgettable gaming experience. More information about Gamingecke.space on our website.
body:
Welcome to Gamingecke Summer 2024! Our **Vanilla+ modpack** invites players to a unique gaming experience. Immerse yourself in a world of exciting adventures and relaxing moments as you explore our custom modpack. Experience summer with **a dash of technology** and discover how we take the traditional Minecraft experience to a new level.

**This modpack was developed for a project by Gamingecke.space and its partners to provide an unforgettable gaming experience. More information about Gamingecke.space on our [website](https://gamingecke.space/).**
